query:
UPDATE permissionGroups 
SET permissions = JSON_REPLACE(
  JSON_REMOVE(permissions, '$.ecommerce'),
  '$.compras',
  JSON_EXTRACT(permissions, '$.ecommerce')
)
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS_PATH(permissions, 'one', '$.ecommerce');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user M967bVXfxXUhp7W.root --database JLPd83LStLYaV7mJXtu8eL --execute UPDATE permissionGroups 
SET permissions = JSON_REPLACE(
  JSON_REMOVE(permissions, '$.ecommerce'),
  '$.compras',
  JSON_EXTRACT(permissions, '$.ecommerce')
)
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS_PATH(permissions, 'one', '$.ecommerce');
